mockBot.initialMessage:
Hello! I am the Kyonggi University Chatbot. 🏫
Ask me about academic calendars, exchange student programs (SEP), tuition payments, classroom guides, etc., for the Suwon and Seoul campuses!

💡 You can also ask quickly by pressing the buttons below.
mockBot.academicCalendar:
Here is the academic calendar for 2026.

[1st Semester]
- Course Registration: Mid-Feb
- Classes Begin: 1st week of March
- Midterms: 3rd week of April
- Finals: 3rd week of June

Please check the university website for details!
mockBot.exchangeStudent: Here is information on the Exchange Student (SEP) program. You can check the current semester's recruitment notice and eligibility on the Office of International Affairs website.
mockBot.tuition: Here is the guide for tuition payment and scholarships. The regular registration period is early to late February, and scholarship applications are processed through the Korea Student Aid Foundation and the Comprehensive Information System.
mockBot.map: I will guide you to the location you requested.
mockBot.phone: Here are the department phone numbers. (Main number: 031-249-9114)
mockBot.cafeteria: Today's menu at Gamseong Core cafeteria is Tonkatsu and Spicy Stir-fried Pork.
mockBot.fallback: I'm sorry. I am still learning about that topic. Please ask another question!
